section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 28 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/11/2025
Today, the Dce experienced a high-level retreat, with the main contract I2601 se ling at 794, down 0.19% compared to the previoustrading day. Traders followed market trends in selling, while steel mills reduced inquiries and showed moderate purchasing interest. Market transac on ac vity remained sluggish.
